response.text:
# REFLECTION

r0c1 is in critical islanded survival mode with SoC at 26.7% (10.41/39 kWh) and ~3–4 hours of autonomy at current 1.0 kW load. The cluster is experiencing cascading energy collapse: r0c0 is at critical 11.5% SoC, r0c2 is repeatedly requesting urgent energy at ~27% SoC, and r1c1 has explicitly distrusted r0c1 pending grid restoration. All peers have rejected outbound sharing requests, citing r0c1's own SoC as below their minimum thresholds (40–65%). The repeated pattern of urgent requests from r0c2 and universal peer rejection signals that the cluster cannot sustain mutual aid—only aggregator emergency injection or grid restoration will break this deadlock. r0c1 must immediately shift from a sharing posture to pure self-preservation: halt all outbound energy transfers, raise the SoC floor to 50% minimum, and await either grid reconnection or external emergency supply. Continuing to offer 0.15 kW/tick to r0c2 accelerates r0c1's own depletion and violates survival-margin protocol when peers are already rejecting inbound requests.

```yaml
sharing_intent: conservative
share_min_soc_frac: 0.50
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.0
recipient_priority: []
distrusted_peers:
  - r1c1
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Cluster in cascading collapse. r0c0 critical (11.5%), r0c2 urgent requests rejected by all peers, r1c1 distrusts r0c1. All outbound sharing suspended. SoC 26.7% requires 50% floor for survival. Only aggregator emergency or grid restoration viable. Await external intervention."
ttl_ticks: 12
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
